name: Visage
description: Visage is a powerful hero with various abilities to summon familiars and manipulate damage.

abilities.name: Stone Form
abilities.description: Summon Familiars reset this ability's cooldown upon cast.

abilities.name: Grave Chill
abilities.description: Grants Visage a movement speed and attack speed buff independently from the debuff applied to the affected enemy unit.

abilities.name: Gravekeeper's Cloak
abilities.description: Generates a stone-layered buff that manipulates incoming damage. Removes a stack per player-based damage taken above a certain damage threshold.

abilities.name: Silent as the Grave
abilities.description: Upon losing the invisibility buff in any way, the ability now grants Visage and its Familiars bonus attack damage. The only affects and not other. Grants all drafted hero models.

abilities.name: Summon Familiars
abilities.description: Familiars will automatically attack Visage's last-attacked target. They will return if that enemy unit is out of Visage's attack range, or when Visage issues a cancel current action or hold position command. The Faithful Followers teleport back to Visage when exceeding a certain range.
